## Checklist

- [ ] Work was done on a **feature branch** (not directly on `main`).
- [ ] **Code Review Agent** run on `main...HEAD` — verdict: <!-- Approve / Request changes -->
- [ ] **Tests** added or updated for behavior changes (TDD).
- [ ] **spec/plan** updated if requirements or iterations changed (SDD).

## Code Review Agent

Before merging, run the review per [`docs/code-review-agent.md`](../docs/code-review-agent.md) (or `@` Code Review Agent in Cursor).  
Optional: `./scripts/review-context.sh` > `review.txt` and attach or paste relevant excerpts.
